lessons.title: Variables & Mutability 🔒
lessons.description: Learn why variables in Rust are immutable by default.

lessons.title: Constants 🏔️
lessons.description: Store values that NEVER change anywhere in your code.

lessons.title: Shadowing 🥷
lessons.description: A powerful feature that lets you override existing variables.

lessons.title: Scope & Blocks 📦
lessons.description: Understand where your variables live and when they die.
